description: Drain the current review pass's accepted minor findings one at a time, then publish one completed per-pass audit task without creating inline implementation tasks.

steps.label: Re-embed plan-scope repositories before minor review fixes
Exit Minor-Fix Path Unless Minor Findings Remain
steps.question: Run `python3 "$CODEINFO_ROOT/scripts/flow_control/check_review_minor_fix_path_clear.py"` now. Do not rely on any previous command output, prior run, cached result, or conversational memory, because repository files and workflow state may have changed since the last time this command was run. This command is authoritative. Return its current stdout exactly and nothing else. Do not read any other files. Do not recompute the answer.

steps.label: Reset coder for next minor review finding
Exit Minor-Fix Path After Sync Unless Another Minor Finding Remains
steps.question: Run `python3 "$CODEINFO_ROOT/scripts/flow_control/check_review_minor_fix_path_clear_after_sync.py"` now. Do not rely on any previous command output, prior run, cached result, or conversational memory, because repository files and workflow state may have changed since the last time this command was run. This command is authoritative. Return its current stdout exactly and nothing else. Do not read any other files. Do not recompute the answer.

steps.label: Generate Or Update Minor-Fix Pass Audit Task
